data.description:
## Summary
Add changekind:TRIVIAL_REBASE to the LLM-Review label copyCondition so a conflict-free, diff-identical rebase onto a newer main (the FFO rebase-to-tip) PRESERVES the LLM-Review vote — only Verified (CI) re-runs. Reverses ADR-0025's deliberate exclusion; the diff-vs-tree asymmetry (review certifies the unchanged diff; CI certifies the changed tree) makes it safe and is Gerrit's own Code-Review default. Verified stays strict (unchanged), keeping the GerriScary vector closed.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] LLM-Review copyCondition includes changekind:TRIVIAL_REBASE
- [ ] Verified copyCondition UNCHANGED (NO_CODE_CHANGE only); config-check passes
- [ ] ADR-0041 documents the reversal + diff-vs-tree rationale + security posture
- [ ] Live cutover applied to refs/meta/config; a TRIVIAL_REBASE preserves LLM-Review
data.title: Carry LLM-Review vote across TRIVIAL_REBASE (ADR-0041) — cut the FFO rebase cost
